missingSurface: Shared provider-owned authoritative read adapter registry for post-commit reconciliation polling across IM1, GP Connect, and the local gateway simulator.
temporaryFallback: phase4-booking-reconciliation.ts defines a typed BookingAuthoritativeReadAdapter seam and accepts simulator-backed injected resolvers while keeping all settlement, dedupe, gate progression, and queue posture inside the canonical booking commit chain.
riskIfUnresolved: Provider-specific read contracts could drift if separate services inject resolver logic independently instead of sharing one capability-owned adapter registry.
followUpAction: Publish one provider-binding authoritative-read adapter registry beside the capability matrix and move injected resolver implementations onto that shared surface.
